title: Dweller dweller
description: Tries to implement cave dweller in a vanilla-friendly way!!
body:
![MCPurity Dweller Dweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78624aa9c4f5fd0a2f271cc2039acfa1c803bf7c.png)Adds a new mob called dweller dweller. He is really powerful and scary so you should run away from him!! But if you're brave enough, you can try and fight him. By killing dweller dweller you'll get his tooth that can be sold in villages or you may craft a necklace with 3 of those teeth. When equipped, the teeth necklace will scare off the nearby dweller dwellers!!

There are also 2 additional painting who no one really cares about.
